title: Greenhouse tomato production in Beydaglari: Increasing value added, sustainable and resilient value chain
description: A practice abstract on greenhouse tomato cultivation in Beydaglari, Turkey describing strategies to enhance value addition, sustainability, and resilience in the local tomato value chain. It outlines main threats including invasive species, drought, and resource overexploitation and recommends cooperative marketing, contract farming, resource-efficient practices, and farmer training.
